notes: Wave 2 of STRATEGIC-INITIATIVES-SPEC: fundamental risk enters the machinery as structure, not adjectives. - Contingent capital. An outlay tied to a gate (contingent_on) spends only in the worlds where that gate passes — expected cost = amount × p, with equity-funding dilution scaled by the same contingency, since shares only issue if the spend happens. Committed capital (no tie) spends regardless, as before. A dangling gate reference is refused at write time with the valid gate ids named. - Shared risks.
